plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: LvTaxi uses your location to detect when you enter and leave staging zones, even when the app is in the background.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: LvTaxi uses your location to show nearby staging zones and your wait position.

infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: LvTaxi uses your location to show nearby staging zones and your wait position.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: LvTaxi tracks your location in the background to detect when you enter and leave staging zones.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: LvTaxi tracks your location in the background to detect when you enter and leave staging zones.
